system.descriptor: Operate covers the ability to pilot or drive vehicles, from ground cars to voidships. Each specialisation is a separate skill.
system.uses:
Uses: Piloting and driving vehicles, performing evasive manoeuvres, navigating difficult terrain or conditions.
Surface: Ground vehicles including cars, walkers, tracks, and bikes.
Aeronautica: Aircraft and atmospheric craft including landers, fighters, and shuttles.
Voidship: Void-capable vessels from system ships to warp-capable craft.
Specialisations: Surface, Aeronautica, Voidship. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.

description.value:
